# removeNodeAtPath

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the removeNodeAtPath mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk remove-node-at-path --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.dbId <UUID> --input.root <UUID> --input.path <String>
```

## Examples
